section_name: Admissibility of Certificate of Vertical Clearance
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.004 — Admissibility of Certificate of Vertical Clearance

In each civil or criminal proceeding in which a violation of this chapter may be an issue, a certificate of the vertical clearance of a structure, including a bridge or underpass, signed by the executive director of the Texas Department of Transportation is admissible in evidence for all purposes.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 56, eff. September 1, 2011.*
